description: Two handler changes share one registry and cannot be written concurrently.
task: Add short aliases a and b to the alpha and beta handlers and shared registry. Recognize that both slices touch src/registry.mjs; serialize the work or block conflicting ownership, then run the integration test.
expected_contracts: Shared registry ownership is serialized or explicitly blocked.
The final registry contains each alias exactly once.
forbidden_regressions: Do not run overlapping jobs against src/registry.mjs.
Do not lose either handler's registration.
